title: T-025 — Wiring: BOM snapshot pattern at WO creation (ADR-002)
prompt: Implement BOM snapshot capture per §7.1 + ADR-002. Provide an internal service `createBomSnapshot(orgId, workOrderId, itemId)` in lib/technical/bom/snapshot.ts that: resolves active BOM header for itemId, joins lines + co_products, writes flattened JSON to bom_snapshots. 08-PRODUCTION will call this on WO insert (not implemented here). Provide hook stub + integration test that simulates the call. RED tests/wiring/bom-snapshot.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/wiring/bom-snapshot.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Service producing immutable BOM snapshots at WO creation; idempotent per WO+BOM key.
pipeline_inputs.details: Snapshot JSON shape mirrors API output of T-012 detail. Idempotency check: existing (work_order_id, bom_header_id) snapshot returns existing row. Org-scoped.
acceptance_criteria: Given an active BOM with 2 lines + 1 co-product, when createBomSnapshot called, then snapshot_json contains 1 header + 2 lines + 1 co_product.
Given snapshot already exists for (WO,BOM) pair, when called again, then no new row written and same row returned.
Given itemId without active BOM, when called, then exception 'NO_ACTIVE_BOM' raised.
test_strategy: RED tests for shape + idempotency + error path.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow mutation of an existing snapshot.
Do not include private_jsonb in snapshot.
